# customer_interactions.md
# Clarion — Customer Interaction Log
# Append-only. Do not edit existing entries.
# All agents must log here when a real interaction occurs.

---

## When to Log

Log an entry whenever:
- Someone asks product questions
- Someone expresses interest in Clarion
- Someone requests pricing
- Someone requests a pilot analysis
- Someone requests a call or walkthrough
- Someone provides feedback on the product or positioning

Do NOT log internal agent activity here. This file is for real external interactions only.

---

## Format

Each entry uses this structure:

---
Date:             [YYYY-MM-DD]
User:             [Name, username, or anonymous identifier]
Firm:             [Firm name or "Unknown"]
Source:           [LinkedIn | Email | Reddit | Twitter | Referral | Other]
Question/Request: [What they asked or expressed]
Response:         [How it was handled — or "Pending"]
Outcome:          [Interested | Not interested | Pilot requested | Call scheduled | Pricing requested | Unclear]
Follow-up needed: [Yes — describe | No]
Logged by:        [Agent name or "CEO"]
---

---
